category_sources: Official IPinfo CLI documentation lists range2cidr among the standalone IP processing binaries.
source_facts.description says range2cidr converts IP ranges to CIDRs.
display_name_sources: Official IPinfo CLI documentation lists a standalone range2cidr binary.
docs_sources: Official IPinfo CLI documentation is the dedicated docs surface for IPinfo command-line tools.
source_facts.repo is the official ipinfo/cli repository; its README documents the standalone binaries.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/ipinfo/cli, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official IPinfo CLI documentation describes IP address processing commands and standalone binaries.
source_facts.description states the IP range to CIDR conversion purpose.
